entry.title: Equinox
entry.summary:
Author: Tan99

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,748Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Grief changes people.Sometimes it breaks them.Sometimes—it rebuilds them into something unrecognizable.What happens when a young Tim Drake is sold by his own parents?When Tim Drake returns to Gotham City, the Bats expects a boy trying to survive loss.What they find instead is someone who already knows how.

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,107Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 69

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

entry.title: The Best Metropolis Pimp
entry.summary:
Author: queerbonafide

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,332Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: “I’ve been thinking...” The dirty tissues quickly landed in the trash can. "I've actually had an idea for a long time. I just needed to be sure you'd agree."  Superman raised both of his eyebrows at him.  "Mhm. And now you're sure I'll agree?" “Yeah. I can't imagine you refusing me anything."   - Clark Kent loves three things; nice tea, boys in lingerie and seeing his best friend getting fucked by others.

entry.title: This wasn't covered in the birds and bees talk
entry.summary:
Author: Star_Chaser_1701

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,649Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 34

Summary: One afternoon when he was fourteen Alfred sat him down for a very awkward conversation about the magazine that was stuffed under his pillow. In retrospect he should have hid it better. But life is full of times when you look back and realize if you’d just done something slightly different you wouldn’t be in the position you are now.

entry.title: The Moon and his Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,357Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: As the only heir to the kingdom of Gotham, Bruce Wayne is bound by duty to marry someone that he doesn't love: the daughter of the Demon's head, Talia al Ghul. He knows, more than anything, that he is expected to do this for the good of his people. Despite this, he can’t keep his desire for his knight, Clark, hidden. When all he wants to do is be pinned underneath Clark 24/7, how is he meant to fulfill his duty to his people?

entry.title: red, white & boy scout blue
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,873Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 109

Summary: 'Bruce chuckles, no ounce of amusement in it, “I believe perhaps you should consider switching to water, Kent.” “Should I?” Clark asks, batting his eyelashes at Bruce. “Why? Am I offending you? Sorry I’m not obsessed with you like everyone else. I know that must be confusing for you.” “You know what?” Bruce eyes him up and down. “I think you are.” Clark is frozen. He can’t move. He blinks a few times, slowly trying to digest the words. He can’t. And Bruce? Well, Bruce’s polite smile turns smug and almost a little mean.' or: Pulitzer winning journalist Clark Kent and playboy Bruce Wayne have to pretend to be friends after one sweet incident. What will happen when this fake friendship turns into a real one? What will happen when it turns into something more?

entry.title: Worst First (Impression)
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,865Chapters: 15/18Kudos: 266

Summary: Years ago, in Smallville, Bruce made an impression on Clark. And not a good one. Now Bruce is back in his life—charming, relentless, and completely unaware of the damage he left behind all those years ago. But Clark hasn't forgotten. And while Batman and Superman learn how to trust each other, their civilian identities are busy getting everything wrong.

entry.summary:
Author: violetlullaby

entry.summary:

entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,428Chapters: 4/12Kudos: 6

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,373Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father.

entry.title: Behind Our Masks
entry.summary:
Author: WriteMeLikeDia

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 99,257Chapters: 14/20Kudos: 34

Summary: Clark Kent is sent to Gotham, tasked with uncovering Bruce Wayne's secret identity as Batman. At first, the banter and tease doesn't take them far, until the two eventually fall into a very complicated relationship.—————By their third shots, Clark feels bold enough to ask, “What about you? Any romantic history?” Bruce doesn’t hesitate to answer with a straight, “No.” “No as in… nothing?” “Never been with a woman,” Bruce says, then adds, “or a man.” Or a man. Clark tries to play a neutral reaction, yet his voice can’t help but come out a little too intrigued as he whispers, “Oh.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent/Batman
